name: Search in a Binary Search Tree
description: Given the root of a BST and an integer val, find the node whose value equals val and return the subtree rooted at that node. If the node does not exist, return null.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 5000]. 1 <= Node.val <= 10^7. root is a valid BST. 1 <= val <= 10^7.

performance.stress_intent: exercise hit and miss behavior across BST shapes; skewed BSTs make linear scans acceptable under the posted constraints
